theme: Why your awards ceremony is forgettable (and how to fix it)

linkedin.text:
Your annual awards ceremony is forgettable.

Here's why:

❌ Same hotel ballroom every year
❌ PowerPoint slides with clip art trophies
❌ A 45-minute CEO speech nobody remembers
❌ Rubber chicken dinner
❌ Winners announced in order of importance (so everyone leaves after #1)

Here's what works:

✅ Unexpected venue (rooftop, museum, vineyard, yacht)
✅ Cinematic production (lighting, sound, LED screens)
✅ Short, personal video tributes for each winner
✅ Reverse order: announce #1 last — keep everyone hooked
✅ A meal that's an experience, not an afterthought

Recognition is the most powerful retention tool you have.
Don't waste it on a forgettable evening.

Make it unforgettable. That's what we do.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#AwardsCeremony #CorporateEvents #EmployeeRecognition #EventProduction #UproductionEvents #HRStrategy #Retention
